sigWerNormalizedGold: 你 可 以 再 一 遍 说
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 你 可 以 在 一 边 说

sigWerErrors.reason: '再' (again) and '在' (at/in) are completely different in meaning; this changes the intent of the sentence from asking to repeat to a location, which derails the meaning.
'遍' (time/iteration) and '边' (side) are unrelated in meaning; this substitution further changes the sentence from 'say it again' to 'say at one side', making the sentence incoherent.
